content:
# Water Based Fluids

**Summary**: Drilling fluids that use water as the primary base instead of oil.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] analyzed the usage frequency of water-based-fluids among local companies.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] WBF is generally preferred for lower environmental risk compared to OBF.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012]] Survey of company usage frequency.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 63.2% of respondent companies generally always used WBF. ([[2012-attyah|Attyah, 2012, p. 131]])
